feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Quotation Number Not Consistently Reflected in Purchase Order CDS Views
entry.content:
For a custom development requirement, we need to derive the Supplier Quotation number linked to a Purchase Order.

Currently, we are referring to the following CDS views:

  • I_PURCHASEORDERAPI01 → Field: SUPPLIERQUOTATIONEXTERNALID
  • I_PURCHASEORDERITEMTP_2 → Field: SUPPLIERQUOTATION

However, we are facing an issue where quotation numbers are not consistently populated in these CDS views.
For some Purchase Orders, the quotation number is displayed correctly, but for other POs that do have an associated quotation, the quotation number is not reflected in either of the above CDS views.

Request:

Please help us understand:

  • Why the quotation number is not available for all relevant Purchase Orders in these CDS views.
  • If there is any alternative standard CDS view or field recommended to reliably retrieve the quotation number linked to a Purchase Order.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatic Clearing of the pre-paid Withholding tax GL Account for Mexico using F.13 in Public Cloud
entry.content:
For Mexico, withholding tax is charged at the time of payment. Therefore, when the invoice document is posted, the withholding tax amount is initially posted to the Prepaid Withholding Tax GL Account in the journal entry. Subsequently, when the payment is executed, the amount is transferred from the Prepaid Withholding Tax GL Account to the Withholding Tax GL Account.

Please find the relevant accounting entries below for reference.

Invoice document:

Payment Document:

 

 

We are currently exploring the possibility of automatically clearing the Prepaid Withholding Tax GL Account using F.13. However, we have observed that there is no common clearing criteria between the invoice and the payment document that can be utilized by F.13.

As a potential solution, we considered using the document reference of the invoice document by copying its value into the Assignment field of the Prepaid WHT GL line item. However, we noticed that the same document reference value is not populated in the payment document, even when the payment is executed for a single invoice. In the payment document, the Document Reference field remains blank.

Could you please confirm if you have encountered a similar scenario before, and if there is any recommended approach to enable automatic clearing in this case by copying the same document reference in the payment document.

entry.title: Is there a Migration Object related to Project Hours (Timesheet Entries Posted to Projects / WBS) ?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

I’m currently working on a project in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  and I need clarification regarding the migration of project‑related timesheet hours, specifically hours recorded per person per day and posted to Projects / WBS elements.
 
Based on my research, here is what I have found there is no migration object for project hours (timesheet entries linked to Projects / WBS) in the Migration Cockpit

Could you please confirm whether:

  • There is no migration object in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for importing project/WBS timesheet hours And is there any possibility to upload using a batch or mass upload of timesheet hours per person/ per day?
Thank you in advance

entry.title: Is there a Migration Object related to Project Hours (Timesheet Entries Posted to Projects / WBS) ?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

I’m currently working on a project in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  and I need clarification regarding the migration of project‑related timesheet hours, specifically hours recorded per person per day and posted to Projects / WBS elements.
 
Based on my research, here is what I have found there is no migration object for project hours (timesheet entries linked to Projects / WBS) in the Migration Cockpit

Could you please confirm whether:

  • There is no migration object in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for importing project/WBS timesheet hours, and is there any possibility to upload using a batch or mass upload of timesheet hours per person/ per day?
Thank you in advance

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud SO Item Ship to party Address Change
entry.content:
We would like to have a different delivery address for the ship-to party at sales order item level.

It seems not possible to edit the ship-to party delivery address in sales order item partner function - I find it greyed out. Please help to advise how can I set the sales order item ship-to party address editable.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ACTIVATION OF COMMINUCATION SETTING API- SAP_COM_0564
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently fetching billing details from SAP to a non-SAP system using the API SAP Self-Billing Cockpit Integration (SAP_COM_0564).

To activate this API, we need to complete the communication setup. However, we are currently unable to perform the communication settings.

Could you please assist us in resolving this issue or guide us on the required steps?

Thank you




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Mass Asset Transfer Across Company Codes in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently operating in an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud environment and have recently created a new company code in the same country as an existing company code.

For asset migration between these company codes, we are currently using the Post Transfer – Across Company Codes Within the Same Country application. Using this app, we are able to transfer assets successfully; however, the process allows us to transfer only one asset at a time.

Since we have a large number of assets that need to be transferred to the new company code, performing the transfer individually for each asset is time-consuming.

We would like to understand:

  • Is there any standard functionality or application available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that supports mass transfer of assets across company codes within the same country?

  • Are there any best practices or recommended approaches for performing this activity efficiently in the Public Cloud environment?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Siva Nagi Reddy

entry.title: GIT Aging report
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there a standard report available for GIT aging stock in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Looking forward to your advice.

Regards,

Kasirajan

entry.title: Request for Flexibility/Evidence in PO Creation – "Create Purchase Order – Advanced" App
entry.content:
- When creating a Purchase Order (PO) using the "Create Purchase Order – Advanced" App, all types of materials are displayed during the material search, regardless of the Purchase Document Type. The client requires material selection to be restricted based on the Document Type (e.g., only Raw Materials should be displayed for Domestic Document Type).
- After selecting the Purchase Order Type, the client requires that only relevant fields be displayed in the Item Table. For instance, fields related to Purchase Requisition and Service should not be displayed for Domestic Purchase Orders.
- The client expects that clicking on an error message during PO creation should directly navigate the user to the exact field or section where the error exists, enabling quick identification and resolution.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP GROW – Service Entry Sheet does not recognize quantity
entry.content:
Hello

We kindly request SAP to:

  1. Confirm whether the described purchase order model is supported for Service Entry Sheet processing in SAP GROW
  2. Clarify the recommended service model for fixed-price services that require service entry and approval
  3. Inform whether there is any:
    • SAP Note
    • KBA
    • Known product limitation
  4. Provide SAP best practice guidance to avoid this issue in future purchase orders

 Business Impact

This issue prevents the registration and approval of already executed services, directly impacting:

  • Procurement operations
  • Service approval process
  • Supplier invoicing and payments

 

 

 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Edit Existing Process Order Number Range Intervals or Add New Process Order Number Range Intervals
entry.content:
In SAP Public Cloud there is no separate configuration node to Define new number ranges with new intervals for Production/Process Order Type (SNRO Object: AUFTRAG). We need to assign specific number range intervals as per business requirement for Process Order Types.

Kindly suggest the way around for this requirement in SAP Public Cloud.

entry.title: Manufacturer Part Number; not visible in Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

Our requisitioners must ensure the right material is purchased and often refer to the Manufacturer Part Number for the highest level of precision. 

However such field is not available in the Purchase Requisition apps although it exists in the Product Master Data. This data should not be confused with "Supplier Part Number" which is a slightly different concept.

Please provide a solution for S4 Hana Public Cloud edition.

Thanks,

Adrien

entry.title: Purchase Order Item Related Delivery address with Country & Region required for custom form
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Good Day.

I need CDS view to get the Purchase Order Item Delivery address related Country & Region, what the relation between the PO and PO item Delivery address and Delivery address related Country & Region fields. Could you please check and provide the relation among those fields.

Thanks in advance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: API Journal Entry-Clearing (asynchronous) the interface call failed;
entry.content:
Question:SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
Calling SOAP Journal Entry-Clearing (asynchronous) API, how to pass in parameters in ABAP Development Tools, and the interface call failed? The call attempts the following three ways, all of which report errors, as follows:
Situation 1:
Use standard SAP_COM_0002, and use service _ id: journalentryBulkclearingrequest _ in.
Error in calling asynchronous SOAP interface: The communication protocol does not exist.

1-11-2Situation 2:
Use standard SAP_COM_0002, and use service _ id: journalentryburkclearningquestions _ webi.
Error in calling asynchronous SOAP interface: The communication protocol does not exist.

Situation 3：
Use standard SAP_COM_0002 and service _ id: co _ fins _ journal _ entry _ bulk _ cle _ sprx. Error in calling asynchronous SOAP interface: Logical port does not belong to consumer agent.

entry.title: Issue with Balance Carryforward and Legacy Data Transfer Settings (CoCode Status & Fiscal Years)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are currently performing the fiscal year-end closing for 2025 in an S/4HANA Public Cloud environment. Our Go-Live/Legacy Data Transfer (LDT) date was 31.05.2025.

I am facing an issue where the P&L accounts in the 2026 Trial Balance are showing cumulative balances (not cleared). To resolve this, I am trying to finalize the settings in the "Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting Specific" app, but I want to ensure I enter the correct values to avoid any further inconsistencies.

Could you please clarify the following for our scenario?

  1. Legacy Data Transfer Segment: Should I change the "Transfer Status" from "Ongoing" to "Completed" at this stage to allow a clean balance carryforward?
  2. Highest Fiscal Year: Since we are now in 2026, should this field be set to 2025 or 2026 to close the previous year and allow 2026 postings?
  3. Closed Fiscal Year: Under the Ledger settings, should the "Closed Fiscal Year" be set to 2024 (the year prior to our LDT)?

Our main goal is to successfully run the Balance Carryforward (FAGLGV) so that the 2026 opening balances are correct and P&L accounts are zeroed out.

Any guidance on the mandatory sequence for these settings would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Stop system-wide outgoing email notifications
entry.content: Is there a way to stop system-wide outgoing email notifications from SAP S/4Hana Public cloud test system?

entry.title: Unable to assign sales area to plant
entry.content:
Hi,

Please see attached screenshot in the CBC org structure. The sales area are unable to assigned to plant.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is it possible to have different vendor on unplanned delivery cost during invoice processing
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to post to a different vendor when using the unplanned delivery cost during invoice processing?

Out business wanted the unplanned delivery cost to be posted as part of the material moving ave price.

Regards,

Fideli

entry.title: Change batch of sales order
entry.content:
Dears
Is there any way to change sales order items' batch number by the application [mass change of sales documents] in SAP cloud public edition?
I would like to change the batch number after registering the order.
I can change sales orders using the following header options. But there is no option of batch from my research. 
Mass Change of Sales Documents | SAP Help Portal

・Change header data
・Change header partner
・Remove header partner
・Reject
・Set billing block
・Remove billing block
・Set delivery block
・Remove delivery block
・Update prices

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
SAP Sales Order Notification 
#SAP Batch

entry.title: [South Korea] DRC Activation and License Usage
entry.content:
Currently, the system is designed to allow activation by country. Since we have two legal entities in Korea, the system is flagging this as excessive license usage (over-usage).

To resolve this, we intend to activate and use DRC for only one of the two entities. However, we are unsure of the specific steps to configure this at the entity level rather than the country level.

Could you please provide guidance or documentation on how to limit the activation to a single legal entity?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
